hero.description: KORE AI responds, qualifies, and follows up on every lead automatically — 24/7. Your team only talks to buyers who are ready to close.

problem.title: Every minute you take to respond, you lose the lead.
problem.subtitle: Real estate is competitive. Whoever responds first wins. Most agencies are set up to lose.

items.title: Leads without response
items.desc: 78% of leads buy from whoever responds first. After 5 minutes, you've already lost them to a competitor.

items.title: Inconsistent follow-up
items.desc: Salespeople forget, get overwhelmed, or misread priorities. Cold leads get colder — and eventually dead.

items.title: Total team dependency
items.desc: If your agent is in a showing, on vacation, or asleep — your business stops. Every hour offline costs you money.

items.title: No pipeline visibility
items.desc: You don't know how many leads you lost this week, why, or where the bottleneck is. You can't fix what you can't see.

solution.title: Your sales team that never sleeps.
solution.subtitle: KORE AI handles every step from first contact to booked appointment — automatically.

steps.title: Lead comes in
steps.desc: From Meta Ads, WhatsApp, your website or property portals. Every lead is captured automatically, no manual entry.

steps.title: AI responds instantly
steps.desc: Personalized response in under 30 seconds, 24/7 — via WhatsApp and email. While competitors are asleep, you're closing.

steps.title: Automatic qualification
steps.desc: The system detects intent, budget, and timeline. Only qualified, high-intent leads reach your team.

steps.title: Appointment booked
steps.desc: AI schedules directly into your calendar. The lead picks a slot. You show up. Zero coordination overhead.

steps.title: Persistent follow-up
steps.desc: If they don't close on the first call, the system follows up automatically with the right message at the right time — until they do.

features.title: Operate like a company 10x your size.
features.subtitle: Without hiring a single extra person.

items.title: Conversational AI
items.desc: Responds to leads via WhatsApp and email with the same quality as your best salesperson — in seconds.

items.title: CRM + Lead Scoring
items.desc: Automatic prioritization. Your team always knows exactly who to call first and why.

items.title: Auto Scheduling
items.desc: Lead picks a time slot. Appointment appears in your calendar. Zero manual coordination.

items.title: AI Follow-up
items.desc: Automatic WhatsApp and email sequences that run until you get a response. Nothing falls through the cracks.

items.title: AI Ad Copy
items.desc: Generate and optimize ad copy for Meta and Google in seconds. More leads, less budget wasted.

items.title: Executive Dashboard
items.desc: Real-time metrics. ROI, conversion rate, response speed — everything you need to make data-driven decisions.

results.title: What changes when you use KORE AI.
results.testimonial: We were losing leads every single day — people just wouldn't get a callback in time. With KORE AI, every lead gets a response in under a minute, day or night. We closed 40% more deals in the first month.

comparison.title: Keep doing the same thing — or scale with AI.
comparison.subtitle: The gap between agencies that grow and those that survive is operational speed.
old_items: Leads go unanswered after hours. You lose them to whoever responds first.
Manual follow-up: forgotten, delayed, or done wrong.
Your team buried in admin tasks instead of closing deals.
No visibility into your pipeline, conversion rate, or ROI.
new_items: Instant response 24/7 via WhatsApp and email. Every lead, every time.
Automatic follow-up sequences until the deal closes or is disqualified.
Your team only closes — AI handles qualification, scheduling, and follow-up.
Real-time dashboard with every metric you need to make smart decisions.

done_with_you.title: We install it. We configure it. We run it.
done_with_you.description: This isn't software you figure out alone. Our team sets up KORE AI inside your operation, configures every AI agent for your specific market and property types, and stays on to optimize monthly.

items.title: Dedicated onboarding
items.desc: We configure the system for your agency from scratch. Zero technical setup required on your end.

items.title: Monthly optimization
items.desc: We review your metrics and improve your AI agents every month so your conversion rate keeps climbing.

cta_final.title: Your next deal shouldn't depend on who's available.
cta_final.description: We implement KORE AI inside your agency and guarantee measurable results within 30 days.
cta_final.sub_cta: or schedule a free 30-min diagnosis call →
cta_final.disclaimer: No long-term contracts · Support included · Results in 30 days
